summary: Replace the hardcoded example design id in designs download / edit upscale / prompt extract / redo examples (and README/SKILL) with a non-account `<design-id>` placeholder.
reason: The generated examples embedded a real, account-linked design id. The original (57628105) had been deleted upstream (breaking the dogfood happy-path probes), and any real id leaks an account artifact into the public library. Using a `<design-id>` placeholder removes the account linkage; the commands were live-verified separately at publish time. Caveat: the press's dogfood treats example text as a live happy-path fixture, so a future local `dogfood --live` will report these four commands as not-found (upstream issue to fix so examples can stay placeholders).
validated_outcome: go build/vet pass in both trees; library verify_skill.py passes with the placeholder.
